reference: Dear Sir, I have a Labrador in my house. He is around two years old. He was vaccinated today in the afternoon around two:zero PM. He bit me, and there are three red scratches on my right hand, but there is one small scratch from which very little blood came. So, do I need to take an injection? I had taken a tetanus injection around eight:zero PM. Now, do I need to take an injection for the dog bite or not?
text: Dear sir, I have a Labrador in my house. He's around 2 years old. He was vaccinated today in the afternoon around 2-0pm. He bit me and there are three red scratches on my right hand, but there is one small scratch from with very little blood change. So, do I need to take an injection? I had taken a tetanus injection around 8-0pm. Now, do I need to take an injection for the dog bite or not?
